name: repo-and-pull-req
description: GitHub, Jira, bug tracking, and email integration — setup, push, wiki, PR review, bug triage, and mail

skills.name: gh_setup
skills.description: Install gh CLI, authenticate with GitHub, verify API access

skills.name: gh_push
skills.description: Push code to GitHub as PR using jj bookmark + git push pattern

skills.name: gh_wiki
skills.description: Create/update GitHub wiki pages with PR knowledge

skills.name: gh_pull_req_review
skills.description: Autonomous PR review — check comments, fix code, answer questions, auto-rebase

skills.name: jira_setup
skills.description: Install jira-cli, create Atlassian account, configure API token

skills.name: jira_push
skills.description: Create/update Jira issues to track pushed work

skills.name: jira_wiki
skills.description: Create/update Confluence pages with PR knowledge sharing

skills.name: jira_pull_req_review
skills.description: Autonomous Jira-linked PR review — check comments, fix, rebase

skills.name: bug_setup
skills.description: Setup unified bug tracking (GitHub Issues + Jira)

skills.name: bug_review
skills.description: AI-powered bug review — triage, prioritize, suggest fix approaches

skills.name: bug_fix
skills.description: Analyze bug, identify root cause, propose and apply code fix

skills.name: mail_setup
skills.description: Setup email accounts (Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo, ProtonMail, Fastmail)

skills.name: mail_send
skills.description: Compose, send, reply, forward emails via IMAP/SMTP

skills.name: mail_review
skills.description: Review inbox for PR notification emails, cross-reference with GitHub

skills.name: mail_notify
skills.description: Send email notifications for PR events

agents.name: review_loop
agents.description: Autonomous hourly PR review agent — reads PR status, processes comments, fixes code, auto-rebases

agents.name: bug_triage
agents.description: Autonomous bug triage agent — periodically classifies bugs by severity and component
